releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Migrate settings to Obsidian 1.13 declarative API

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-explorer-focus/compare/0.2.1...0.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

0.2.0 cleared every scorecard warning except "Build verification
failed: main.js built from source does not match the release
artifact". The cause was `sourcemap: "inline"` in esbuild.config.mjs:
an inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so the CI build (/home/runner/work/...) and the
scorecard's reproducer build (a different path) produce
byte-different output even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (`pnpm build` /
`node esbuild.config.mjs production`) now ships `sourcemap: false`,
while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap: "inline"` for local
debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic given the locked
dependency tree, so the reproducer matches and build verification
passes. As a bonus the shipped main.js is smaller and no longer
leaks build paths.

Bump to 0.2.1.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-explorer-focus/compare/0.2.0...0.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Scorecard cleanup pass for 0.2.0

- Replace bare `document` references with `activeDocument` for
  popout-window compatibility (10 sites in settings-tab.ts and
  file-explorer.ts).
- Swap `document.createElement('div')` for `createDiv()`,
  `document.createElementNS(...)` SVG calls for `createSvg(...)`,
  `document.createDocumentFragment()` for `createFragment()`, and
  `el.createEl('div', { text: ... })` for `el.createDiv({ text: ... })`
  — all autofixed by `obsidianmd` 0.3.0.
- Swap bare `setTimeout` calls for `window.setTimeout` for popout
  compatibility (autofixed).
- Type the file-explorer prototype access in
  `file-explorer-patch.ts` instead of leaving it as `any`. The
  runtime `typeof getSortedFolderItems === 'function'` check still
  validates the cast before `around()` patches it.
- Prefix the unused `plugin` parameter in file-explorer.ts with `_`
  (autofixed).
- Add `pnpm.overrides` for the minimatch / picomatch /
  brace-expansion / ajv / flatted / yaml chain pulled in transitively
  by eslint and the obsidianmd plugin.
- Upgrade `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` 0.1.9 -> 0.3.0 and scope its
  recommended config to TypeScript files only so the type-aware
  rules don't choke on `.mjs` files.
- Drop the broken `preinstall` script and fill in the package author.
- Add a portable CONTRIBUTING.md.
- Replace the old release workflow with the canonical one: pulls
  the version from manifest.json, attaches build provenance
  attestations to main.js / styles.css / manifest.json, builds the
  release notes from the latest commit message plus a Full
  Changelog link, and exposes a workflow_dispatch trigger as a
  recovery path. The previous workflow pointed at `dist/` for the
  output assets, which doesn't exist (build emits to repo root),
  so the previous releases never uploaded the right artifacts.

Bump to 0.2.0.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-explorer-focus/compare/0.1.9...0.2.0

Added option to hide folders from file explorer.
Autocomplete for folder fields added.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Update minimum version to 1.11.0 and remove backwards compatibility for SettingGroup.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
refactor: remove i18n, optimize performance, and update agent skills

- Remove i18n support and lang/ directory; move to hardcoded English
- Optimize refreshFileExplorerVisibility for large vaults using Set-based lookups
- Add graceful degradation and error handling for file explorer monkey-patches
- Standardize .agent/skills structure and add platform/CSS guidelines
- Document internal Obsidian types in types.d.ts
- Update .gitignore to exclude package-lock.json

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed minor bug where settings modal would close when plugin activated.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Scoped settings container to avoid affecting other plugins.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Migrate from npm to pnpm and update dependencies

- Switch package manager from npm to pnpm with packageManager field
- Add preinstall script for npm/pnpm compatibility
- Update dependencies (esbuild 0.17.3 → 0.25.5, TypeScript 4.8.4 → 5.8.3)
- Add migration scripts (switch-to-pnpm.mjs, npm-proxy.mjs, upgrade.mjs)
- Update documentation to reference pnpm instead of npm
- Remove npm-specific files (package-lock.json, .npmrc)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Migrate to Explorer Focus with agents system and SettingGroup support

- Rename plugin from Simple Focus to Explorer Focus (all classes, CSS, identifiers)
- Add .agents system with reference repositories (Simple Focus, UI Tweaker)
- Set up ESLint 9 with flat config
- Implement SettingGroup compatibility utility for Obsidian 1.11.0+
- Update settings tab to use SettingGroup pattern
- Transform README to match UI Tweaker format
- Update AGENTS.md with comprehensive project context

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed hover-cursor treatment on file explorer icon on desktop and mobile.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Simple focus now works in mobile.
styles.css file generation is now optional.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Replace DOM manipulation with virtual element patching

- Migrate from MutationObserver-based DOM manipulation to patching
  getSortedFolderItems method for stable file hiding
- Remove all CSS and inline style manipulation code
- Simplify focus logic to basic show/hide without indentation features
- Add updateFocusModeClasses() for CSS class management
- Export FileExplorerView type with containerEl property

This approach integrates with Obsidian's virtual scrolling system and eliminates scroll position issues that occurred with DOM manipulation.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add toggle command, settings panel, file explorer icon, and focus level options

- Replace separate enter/exit commands with single toggle command
- Add settings panel with options for right-click menu, file explorer icon visibility, and focus level
- Add file explorer icon button in nav-buttons-container with is-active state highlighting
- Add focus level options: file, parent folder, grandparent folder, great grandparent folder, and custom folder path
- Fix virtual scrolling bug by adding MutationObserver for dynamically loaded file tree items
- Update build config to output files to root directory instead of dist/
- Update language files with new translation strings
- Bump version to 0.0.5
